data.title: Microservices Design
data.description: The website is built on a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and agility.
data.technical_spec: Deployed using containerized services, managed through Kubernetes.

data.title: Responsive Framework
data.description: Responsive design allows seamless functioning across devices.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using CSS3 Media Queries and Bootstrap as the front-end framework.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Employs a global CDN to decrease page load times.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Akamai services for caching and distribution.

data.title: Distributed Database Architecture
data.description: Utilizes distributed database systems to ensure reliability and performance.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates NoSQL databases like Cassandra and SQL-based systems for structured data.

data.title: Serverless Functions
data.description: Leverages serverless computing for backend operations.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using AWS Lambda and API Gateway for serverless architectures.
